messages.message:

You are receiving this email because we received a password reset request for your account. Reset Password: http://127.0.0.1:8000/reset-password/20191498eabe160a01fff7eae2b4157b058551610925104d552244d3c0b62a15?email=admin%40supremeprotection.com This password reset link will expire in 60 minutes. If you did not request a password reset, no further action is required. Regards, Supreme Security If you're having trouble clicking the "Reset Password" button, copy and paste the URL below into your web browser: [http://127.0.0.1:8000/reset-password/20191498eabe160a01fff7eae2b4157b058551610925104d552244d3c0b62a15?email=admin%40supremeprotection.com](http://127.0.0.1:8000/reset-password/20191498eabe160a01fff7eae2b4157b058551610925104d552244d3c0b62a15?email=admin%40supremeprotection.com) © 2025 Supreme Security. All rights reserved. --skZE68Va Content-Type: text/html; charset=utf-8 Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable Supreme Security
Supreme Security

Hello!

You are receiving this email because we received a password reset request for your account.

Reset Password

This password reset link will expire in 60 minutes.

If you did not request a password reset, no further action is required.

Regards,
Supreme Security

If you're having trouble clicking the "Reset Password" button, copy and paste the URL below into your web browser: http://127.0.0.1:8000/reset-password/20191498eabe160a01fff7eae2b4157b058551610925104d552244d3c0b62a15?email=admin%40supremeprotection.com

© 2025 Supreme Security. All rights reserved.
--skZE68Va--

statements.sql: select * from `users` where `email` = 'admin@supremeprotection.com' and `users`.`deleted_at` is null limit 1

mails.subject: Reset Password Notification
mails.headers:
From: Supreme Security <hello@example.com>
To: admin@supremeprotection.com
Subject: Reset Password Notification
mails.body:
Supreme Security: https://supreme.voags.com/

# Hello!

You are receiving this email because we received a password reset request for your account.

Reset Password: http://127.0.0.1:8000/reset-password/20191498eabe160a01fff7eae2b4157b058551610925104d552244d3c0b62a15?email=admin%40supremeprotection.com

This password reset link will expire in 60 minutes.

If you did not request a password reset, no further action is required.

Regards,
Supreme Security

If you're having trouble clicking the "Reset Password" button, copy and paste the URL below
into your web browser: [http://127.0.0.1:8000/reset-password/20191498eabe160a01fff7eae2b4157b058551610925104d552244d3c0b62a15?email=admin%40supremeprotection.com](http://127.0.0.1:8000/reset-password/20191498eabe160a01fff7eae2b4157b058551610925104d552244d3c0b62a15?email=admin%40supremeprotection.com)

© 2025 Supreme Security. All rights reserved.
